title: Elmer, the Great
writer: Ring Lardner, George M. Cohan, Thomas J. Geraghty
actors: Joe E. Brown, Patricia Ellis, Frank McHugh
plot: Country bumpkin Elmer Kane joins the Chicago Cubs as the greatest hitter in baseball. His skill with a bat takes the team to the World Series, but on the way to the championship he has to deal with gamblers and crooked pitchers.
